sub_modules.fp32_q15_quantizer: Converts one IEEE-754 FP32 input value to a zero-point-centered quantized integer using a Q15 scale.
sub_modules.int_dot_product: Computes one INT32 dot product from K centered quantized A and B values.
sub_modules.q15_dequantizer: Converts one INT32 accumulator result back to IEEE-754 FP32 using the product of the two Q15 scales.
